name: project_scanner
description: Scan a project directory and return a structured summary including file tree, language breakdown, file statistics, and detected frameworks. Useful for understanding an unfamiliar codebase before making changes.

path.description: Root directory to scan. Defaults to current working directory.

max_depth.description: Maximum directory depth to recurse into. Default 5.

output.description: Optional path to write the JSON result to a file.
